source.note: seriesCode 110302650660 (the older stored 110302683860 returns PAGE NOT FOUND)

part_frame.note: bore/spin axis = local X; mesh X 0..15 (centre 7.5). axial coords measured from x=7.5. DRAWING-TRUE (drw_01_001_3x.png 'Center Bearing' 2-bearing cross-section + spec table, 2026-06-21): this is a 685ZZ x2 ball-bearing idler. Axial chain along X: flange-near x=0..2.5 (S=2.5) | bearing-1 x=2.5..7.5 (B=5) | bearing-2 x=7.5..12.5 (B=5) | flange-far x=12.5..15 (S=2.5). So the two Ø5-bore inner races are CONTIGUOUS, x=2.5..12.5 = 10 mm. Flange disc Ø22 with a center opening Ø~9.8; the flange lip (Ø9.8 < bearing OD Ø11) axially captures the bearings in the hub. The idler BODY (drum + flanges + bearing OUTER races + shields) ROTATES; the bearing INNER races must clamp to the FIXED shoulder screw. Inner-race faces sit at x=2.5 and x=12.5, RECESSED 2.5 mm behind each flange outer face (x=0 / x=15). Retention: a precision spacer per side (ID5, OD<=~7.5 to press the inner ring and clear the rotating shield, ~3 mm thick) reaches through the Ø9.8 opening to the inner-race face and protrudes past the flange so the bracket face (near) and screw head (far) clamp the inner races, NOT the rotating flanges. Stack on the 16 mm shoulder: 3 + 10 + 3 = 16 (exact). NOTE: the raw CAD has an axial conversion glitch (auxiliary bodies collapse to one X); trust this drawing-derived layout, not CAD axial positions.

unknowns: the Ø5 race is recessed; clamping it to the axle requires a shim in each flange recess (see frame note)
inner-race face at x=2.5, recessed 2.5 mm behind flange outer face (x=0); a spacer (ID5/OD<=7.5/~3 mm) reaches it through the Ø9.8 flange opening to transfer clamp force to the stationary inner race

inner-race face at x=12.5, recessed 2.5 mm behind flange outer face (x=15); a spacer (ID5/OD<=7.5/~3 mm) reaches it through the Ø9.8 flange opening to transfer clamp force to the stationary inner race

evidence.raw_value: Center Bearing 2-bearing cross-section: bottom axial chain S|B|B|S = 2.5|5|5|2.5; spec table SHTF20/S3M100 row: d=5, P.D.=19.1, O.D.=18.34, F=22, E=14, A=11, W=15, S=2.5, bearing=685ZZ x2 (D=11, B=5)
